hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 3.23 km from property

address.address1: Jl. Mon Tuk Kade, Landom, Kec. Lueng Bata

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers car park free of charge. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.

details.title: Infant 0-1 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 2-7 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 8 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.
